div.head: The Ambassador in Argentina (Weddell) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 127. As previously arranged I this afternoon met the Minister for Foreign Affairs and the Brazilian Ambassador.

At this meeting we received a note dated today addressed to the three of us by the Paraguayan Minister in this city quoting in full the Argentine peace formula and accepting the same “without reservations” in the name of his Government. Copies by next air mail unless otherwise instructed.
It was felt that the fact of Paraguay’s acceptance would be most confidential to our respective Governments and should not be communicated to the Bolivian Government.
